hook: Your AI resume has LinkedIn breath.
subhook: Polished. Beige. Missing the role language.
punchline: Polished is not the same as searchable.
problemPunchline: The resume is smooth. Recruiter search still misses it.
teardownPunchline: This is the part the ATS cannot search.
fixPunchline: Now the resume speaks the job description.
afterBullet: Cut CAC by 32% through LinkedIn Ads audience segmentation and HubSpot lead scoring.
cta: Paste your resume + job. Get your free Signal score.
